notes: All four are the canonical stating-vocabulary for a substitution-based inference rule: substitution notation (phi[t/x]) and the soundness-critical 'free for' proviso are load-bearing; term is the substituend type. def:formula is the borderline member -- but unlike a pure preamble locator (cf. def:axiom 0035-0002, where def:language was dropped), phi here is the object the rule transforms and substitution is defined on formulas, so it is judged integral rather than ambient. Kept; flagged as the member a reviewer is most likely to contest.
